# ScaleXWeb Solution

> Ahmedabad-based digital agency building custom websites, mobile apps, SaaS platforms, and e-commerce stores for startups and enterprises.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of ScaleXWeb's services, industries served, and process.
- [About](/about): Company story, vision, mission, leadership, and values.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Business challenges we solve and solution categories.
- [SaaS Products](/saas-products): SaaS architecture, features, and custom build offerings.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact form, email, location, and FAQ.

## Services

- [Website Development](/services/website-development): Corporate sites, landing pages, portals, and e-commerce.
- [App Development](/services/app-development): iOS, Android, React Native, and PWA apps.
- [SaaS Development](/services/saas-development): Multi-tenant SaaS platforms built for scale.
- [E-Commerce](/services/ecommerce): Shopify and custom online stores.
- [UI/UX Design](/services/ui-ux-design): Research, wireframing, and design systems.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service)
